CONFIRMATIONS TEAM · DAY 1
Core Values The foundation everything else sits on.
Seven values. Fifteen minutes. The most important fifteen minutes of your first week.
↓
Scroll to begin
WELCOME
Success here is not random.
It comes from consistently applying the right behaviours, backed by the right systems. You don't need to be perfect from day one. What matters is that you show up with the right attitude, stay open to feedback, and commit to getting better every single day.

The people who succeed here are not necessarily the most experienced — they are the ones who lean into these values early, stay consistent, and take ownership of their development.
"If you stick to these values consistently, it becomes very hard not to succeed."

Flip all 7 cards to unlock the values in depth ↓
VALUE 01Personal Responsibility
Own everything.
Own everything. Your results, your attitude, your development. Things happen because of you — not to you. Take full accountability for your pipeline, your calls and your performance.
REFLECTION
When something goes wrong, what's your first instinct — own it, or explain it?
VALUE 01 · INTERACTIVE
The Accountability Ladder
🎯
Drag each behaviour into the correct column — Accountable or Victim. All 8 must be placed correctly to continue.
BEHAVIOURS TO SORT

✅
Accountable
Things happen BECAUSE of you
❌
Victim
Things happen TO you
Place all 8 behaviours correctly to continue ↓
VALUE 02Always Do The Right Thing
Integrity is non-negotiable.
Do right by the customer, the team and yourself — even when no one is watching. Trust is built through consistent, honest actions. Every day there are small moments where you choose the easy path or the right path. At RESINC, the right path is the only path.
REFLECTION
What does doing the right thing look like on a call where it would be easier to stretch the truth?
VALUE 03Continuous Improvement
Never stop getting better.
37×
1% better every day = 37 times better in a year. The compound effect of small, consistent improvements is extraordinary.
Every call, every day is an opportunity to improve. Demand more from yourself than anyone else could possibly expect. Raise your standards. The people who plateau are the ones who think they've figured it out. Finish every call asking: what could I have done better?
REFLECTION
What's one skill in this role you want to be noticeably better at in 90 days?
VALUE 04Stay Coachable
Ego is the enemy of growth.
The fastest path to growth is being open to feedback. Apply it quickly and without ego. The most coachable people in the room improve the fastest. The best performers here ask for feedback the most — not the least.
✅ COACHABLE
→ Asks for feedback proactively
→ Tries it on the next call
→ Says "you're right, let me try that"
→ Improves week on week
❌ UNCOACHABLE
→ Waits to be told
→ Nods then does it their way
→ Says "yeah but at my last job..."
→ Plateaus after week 3
REFLECTION
When was the last time someone gave you feedback you didn't love — and you actually acted on it?
VALUE 05Follow The System
Master the system first.
The system works when you work it. Trust the frameworks, the processes and the tools that have been proven to get results. Consistency in the process creates consistency in outcomes.

Improvising on day two is like deciding the recipe is wrong before you've tasted the dish.
1
WEEK 1–2
Learn the system exactly as it is — no shortcuts, no improvisation
2
WEEK 3–4
Master it — do it without thinking
3
MONTH 2
Understand WHY it works — not just what to do, but why each step matters
4
MONTH 3+
Earn the right to suggest improvements — with data to back it up
VALUE 06Present With Conviction
How you show up matters.
Lead with energy, confidence and certainty on every call. Customers feel your conviction — it builds trust and drives bookings. You can't transfer certainty to a customer if you don't feel it yourself.
LISTEN — SAME ROLE, FOUR LEVELS OF CONVICTION
VALUE 07Spread Positivity & Optimism
Energy is contagious.
Bring the right attitude every single day — for yourself, your team and your customers. Positivity is a choice. Make it consistently. Real optimism is believing the next call could be the one.
THE RESET — WHAT TO DO WHEN IT'S TOUGH
Just had a rough call
30 seconds. Deep breath. The person who picks up next is a completely different person.
Three hang-ups in a row
The fourth call doesn't know about the first three. Every call starts fresh.
It's 4pm on a Friday
Someone's electricity bill is still arriving Monday. That opportunity is real right now.
You're just not feeling it
Act the way you want to feel. The feeling follows — every time.
HONEST CHECK-IN
Rate yourself right now
For each value, drag the slider to where you honestly are right now. Not where you want to be — where you actually are. This is just for you.
The top performers here ask themselves this question every single day. Where your lowest scores are — that's where your growth is.
KNOWLEDGE CHECK
4 scenario questions
🎯
Scenario-based. No trick questions. Probably. Get each one right to continue. Wrong answers give you feedback — try again.
ONE LAST THING
These aren't values RESINC has.
They're values RESINC lives.
Every performance review, every coaching session, every recognition — it all comes back to these seven things.
"How aligned was I with these values today — out of 10?"
That question, answered honestly every day, is where real growth happens.
✓ CORE VALUES COMPLETE
Welcome to the team.
Properly this time.
You know the standard. Keep it visible. Ask yourself the 1–10 question every single day. The people who take this seriously on day one are the ones who look back in six months and barely recognise how far they've come.
